subcodes.title: LOTU FAKAFETAI I TE TAIPOLA
subcodes.first_line:
## LOTU FAKAFETAI I TE TAIPOLA

A Ia ko te Atua!  E mafai pefea o siki atu a fakafetai kia Koe, o te Aliki?  Au mea-alof
subcodes.notes: auto-unlinked (moderate-ratio) from BH09401 — Opens 'How can we offer thanks to Thee'; different thanksgiving prayer, not the 'All praise' prayer
